The NDA explicitly prohibits the disclosure of confidential information to any external parties, including regulatory bodies. We understand that your testimony may involve sensitive details, and we urge you to exercise extreme caution in your statements.

Please be aware that any breach of the NDA will be met with swift and severe legal action. We will not hesitate to take all necessary steps to protect our company’s interests and confidential information.

We expect your full cooperation in this matter and remind you of your obligations under the NDA. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Company Name]", "recipient": "[Witness Email]", "subject": "Reminder: Confidentiality Obligations under NDA"}
